channel.title: International Trade and World Market - Tag - bounds.dev
channel.description: International Trade and World Market - Tag - bounds.dev

item.title: A.I. and Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A.I. and Tariff Tango

In tech, they’ve invested a ton,
Data centers help the economy run.
But Trump’s latest act,
Doubles tariffs, that’s fact,
So India’s trade deals are undone.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • The A.I. Spending Frenzy Is Propping Up the Real Economy, Too
  • Trump Raises Tariffs on India to 50% Over Russian Oil

item.title: Trump's High-Tech and High-Stakes Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s High-Tech and High-Stakes Tango

There’s a man in D.C. with a plan,
To regulate chips as he can.
Deals with AI makers,
While deploying guards and takers,
And meeting Putin, Alaska’s his span.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Has Made Himself Commander in Chief of the Chip Industry
  • What to Know About Trump’s Deal With A.I. Chipmakers
  • Trump to Meet Putin at U.S. Military Base in Anchorage
  • Trump’s D.C. Crackdown Plan Begins to Take Shape as National Guard Deploys

item.title: Trump's Tumultuous Tactics
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Tumultuous Tactics

Trump’s tariffs with China on pause,
A move that gave markets applause.
With D.C. in his sights,
And college funding fights,
He reshapes the rules without cause.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Extends China Tariff Truce by Three Months
  • For Trump, Cities Like Washington Are Real Estate in Need of Fixing Up
  • How College Financial Troubles Could Reshape Student Life

item.title: Netanyahu's Bold Move and Trump's Trade Groove
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Netanyahu’s Bold Move and Trump’s Trade Groove

Netanyahu’s plan was quite bold,
To capture a city of old.
Though allies did chide,
He stood firm with pride,
While Trump’s tariffs left trade in the cold.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Netanyahu Broadly Criticized at Home and Abroad After New Gaza Plan
  • Japan Says Trump to Correct ‘Extremely Regrettable’ Error in Tariff Order
  • Taiwan Strained by 20% Tariffs, No Trade Deal and Political Uncertainty

item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

When Trump widened trade with a fight,
Nations saw tariffs take flight.
China raced to the docks,
While Europe took stock,
In a world where costs rose overnight.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Staggering U.S. Tariffs Begin as Trump Widens Trade War
  • Trump’s Higher Tariffs Are Here. Now What?
  • China’s Exports Surged in July as Companies Raced to Beat Trump Tariffs

item.title: Trump's Tumultuous Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Tumultuous Tango

There once was a leader named Trump,
Whose tariffs gave markets a bump.
He blamed weak job stats,
And showed donors his hat,
While firing folks with a thump.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Fires BLS Commissioner, Claiming Weak Jobs Numbers Were ‘Rigged’
  • Donor List Suggests Scale of Trump’s Pay-for-Access Operation
  • After a Lag, Consumers Begin to Feel the Pinch of Tariffs

item.title: Trade Tiffs and Job Riffs
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trade Tiffs and Job Riffs

With tariffs, Trump plays quite the game,
Canada’s anger is hard to tame.
Jobs dwindle and sway,
As AI leads the way,
And sanctions on Russia inflame.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Gives Mexico a Reprieve but Slams Canada With Higher Tariffs
  • Employers Pulled Back on Hiring, Adding 73,000 Jobs
  • Trump Sharpens Sanctions Threat on Russia, While Admitting It May Not Work

item.title: Economic Quakes and Political Shakes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economic Quakes and Political Shakes

The tariffs caused data to waver,
Leaving Lula and Trump in a quaver.
The Fed held its rates,
While the judge sealed his fate,
And farm subsidies sparked some disfavor.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Economy Grew in Second Quarter as Tariffs Scrambled Data
  • Brazil’s President Lula Voices Frustration With Trump Amid Tariff Battle
  • What to Watch at the Federal Reserve’s July Meeting
  • Trump’s Tax Bill Expands Farm Subsidies. Not All Farmers Will Benefit.
  • Tsunami Reaches U.S., and Trump’s Former Lawyer Confirmed as Judge

item.title: A Shot at Trade and Tranquility
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

A Shot at Trade and Tranquility

A shooter in Midtown took aim,
Costly tariffs add to the flame.
With Europe in dread,
And shoppers misled,
Both trade and peace are a game.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Gunman Fatally Shoots Officer and 3 Others in Midtown Office Tower
  • Trump Is Winning His Trade War. What Will That Mean for the Economy?
  • Shoppers Embrace ‘Christmas in July’ Amid Rising Costs and Tariff Limbo

item.title: Deals and Cries on the Global Stage
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Deals and Cries on the Global Stage

Trump’s trade deal, a global reprieve,
Though details are hard to believe.
Europe’s wary of cost,
But new fissures are lost,
While Gaza’s cries make the world grieve.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Europe, Worried by Other Global Crises, Agrees to Trump’s Trade Deal
  • Outrage Grows Over Starvation in Gaza, and a Mysterious Pentagon Budget Line
  • Is the EU Trade Deal With Trump Good for Europe?
